Class MediaEntry

java.lang.Object
MediaEntry
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Album, Anime, Movie
public abstract class MediaEntry extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a generic media entry in the user's library. Relationships: - Abstract superclass of Album, Anime, and Movie. - Stores the attributes and behaviors shared by all media entry types.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • MediaEntry

      public MediaEntry(String title, Status status, int rating, String review)
      Constructor for the MediaEntry class. Initializes the common attributes shared by all media entries. Ratings and reviews are only stored when the entry is marked as COMPLETED.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the media
      status - the media status
      rating - the user's rating
      review - the user's review

  • Method Details

    • getMediaType

      public abstract String getMediaType()
      Returns the specific media type. Implemented by each subclass.
      Returns:
      the media type

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the title.
      Returns:
      the media title

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Updates the title.
      Parameters:
      title - the new title

    • getStatus

      public Status getStatus()
      Returns the current status.
      Returns:
      the media status

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(Status status)
      Updates the media status. If the new status is not COMPLETED, any existing rating and review are cleared because they are only applicable to completed entries.
      Parameters:
      status - the new status

    • getRating

      public int getRating()
      Returns the stored numeric rating.
      Returns:
      the rating

    • setRating

      public void setRating(int rating)
      Updates the rating.
      Parameters:
      rating - the new rating

    • getDisplayRating

      public String getDisplayRating()
      Returns a formatted rating for display.
      Returns:
      "-" if no rating exists; otherwise the rating

    • getReview

      public String getReview()
      Returns the review.
      Returns:
      the review

    • setReview

      public void setReview(String review)
      Updates the review.
      Parameters:
      review - the new review

    • getDisplayReview

      public String getDisplayReview()
      Returns a formatted review for display.
      Returns:
      "-" if no review exists; otherwise the review
